title: More Nonsense Limerick 45
content:
There was an old man of Cashmere,
    Whose movements were scroobious and queer;
    Being slender and tall,
    He looked over a wall,
    And perceived two fat ducks of Cashmere.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 45"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
